_comment: Field map for FNMA Form 1004 URAR — Single Family Residential.
_phase: Phase 2 — calibrated 2026-03-09. All 12 fields confirmed via live ACI test (12/12 found, tx32_label_proximity). calibrated=true set on all fields.
_calibration_note: TX32 fields do not use UIA automation_ids. All fields targeted via label-proximity strategy. calibrated=true confirms live test passed. Re-run calibrate_aci.py if ACI version changes.
_calibration: HOW TO CALIBRATE: 1) Open ACI with a 1004 report loaded. 2) Start desktop_agent/agent.py. 3) Run: python desktop_agent/calibrate_aci.py. 4) Re-run: python _test_aci_live.py 1004 to confirm 24/24 pass.

_schema.label: Human-readable field label — used for label-proximity TX32 matching
_schema.aliases: Alternative label texts to try if primary label does not match
_schema.tab_name: Partial tab name to click before targeting (e.g. 'Neig' matches 'Neighborhood' tab)
_schema.automation_id: UIA AutomationId — fill from /calibrate output if available
_schema.class_name: Windows class name for RichEdit controls — fill from /calibrate if available
_schema.class_index: 0-based index among controls of this class_name
_schema.control_index: 0-based index among ALL text-input controls — last resort fallback
_schema.expected_classes: Expected Windows control classes for this field — used for validation
_schema.verification_mode: How to verify insertion: tx32_readback | uia_get_value | skip

neighborhood_description.label: Neighborhood Description
neighborhood_description.notes: Primary narrative field on Neighborhood tab. TX32 content area. Tab partial: 'Neig'. No label title strip found — uses aci_full_addendum_view (largest content TX32). Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

market_conditions.label: Market Conditions Comments
market_conditions.notes: Market conditions narrative on Neighborhood tab. ACI label text confirmed: 'Market Conditions Comments'. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

site_comments.label: Site Comments
site_comments.notes: Site section narrative. Tab partial: 'Site'. ACI label text confirmed: 'Site Comments'. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

improvements_condition.label: Improvements Comments
improvements_condition.notes: Improvements/condition narrative. Tab partial: 'Impro'. ACI label text confirmed: 'Improvements Comments'. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

sales_comparison_commentary.label: Sales Comparison Comments
sales_comparison_commentary.notes: Sales comparison narrative. Tab partial: 'Sales'. ACI label text confirmed: 'Sales Comparison Comments'. HIGH PRIORITY. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

reconciliation.label: Reconciliation Comments
reconciliation.notes: Reconciliation narrative. Tab partial: 'Reco'. ACI label text confirmed: 'Reconciliation Comments'. HIGH PRIORITY. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

cost_approach.label: Cost Approach Comments
cost_approach.notes: Cost approach narrative. Tab partial: 'Cost'. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

income_approach.label: Income Approach Comments
income_approach.notes: Income approach narrative. Tab partial: 'Income'. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

offering_history.label: Offering History
offering_history.notes: Offering/prior sales history narrative. On Sales tab. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

contract_analysis.label: Contract Analysis
contract_analysis.notes: Contract analysis narrative. On Sales tab. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

functional_utility.label: Functional Utility
functional_utility.notes: Functional utility/obsolescence narrative. On Improvements tab. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.

adverse_conditions.label: Adverse Conditions
adverse_conditions.notes: Adverse conditions / external factors narrative. On Site tab. Confirmed live 2026-03-09.
